meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Samraj Moorjani: Accelerate High quality Agent Development with MLflow
meta.description:
Building high-quality agents is one of the biggest challenges teams face today, often requiring vibe checks, manual labeling, analyzing traces by hand, and endless iterations. 

In this presentation by Samraj Moorjani, Software Engineer at Databricks, attendees learned how to streamline this process with MLflow to enable the rapid development of high-quality agents, leveraging techniques used by leading companies with deployed agents in production.

------------

Join us at AI Dev 26 x San Francisco! Tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
